title: rubus × flexibilis
intro: Rubus × flexibilis, also known as the flexible black raspberry, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It possesses medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of anthocyanins, which are powerful antioxidants that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus × flexibilis include its potential to reduce the risk of certain cancers, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and jams, to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
